<script>(function () {
    const menu = document.getElementById('shortcut-menu');
    if (!menu) return;

    // Selector for elements that Arrow Up/Down should navigate between.
    // We intentionally select the menu's links (including those with tabindex="-1").
    const MENU_ITEM_SELECTOR = '.nav-assistant-link, .nav-assistant-menu-item, a[href]';

    // Selector used elsewhere to get general focusable elements (keeps original behavior).
    const FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR = 'a[href], button, input, select, textarea, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])';

    let menuOpen = menu.classList.contains('nav-assistant-visible');
    let lastInputType = null;   // 'keyboard' | 'mouse' | 'touch' | null
    let lastKey = null;         // store last key (we use this to detect Tab)
    let lastFocusedInside = null;

    // Helpers
    const getFocusableInside = () => Array.from(menu.querySelectorAll(FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR))
        .filter(el => !el.hasAttribute('disabled') && el.offsetParent !== null);

    // For arrow navigation we include links even if tabindex="-1".
    const getMenuItems = () => Array.from(menu.querySelectorAll(MENU_ITEM_SELECTOR))
        .filter(el => !el.hasAttribute('disabled') && el.offsetParent !== null);

    // Locate the Skip-to list and Quick-access list by aria-labelledby (matches your markup)
    const skipList = menu.querySelector('[aria-labelledby="nav-assistant-skip-to-heading"]');
    const quickList = menu.querySelector('[aria-labelledby="nav-assistant-links-heading"]');

    const openMenu = () => {
        if (!menu.classList.contains('nav-assistant-visible')) {
            menu.classList.add('nav-assistant-visible');
        }
        menuOpen = true;
    };

    const closeMenu = () => {
        if (menu.classList.contains('nav-assistant-visible')) {
            menu.classList.remove('nav-assistant-visible');
        }
        menuOpen = false;
    };

    // Update last input modality
    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        lastInputType = 'keyboard';
        lastKey = e.key;

        // Dismiss with Escape
        if (menuOpen && e.key === 'Escape') {
            closeMenu();
            let logo = document.getElementById('tieks-logo');
            if (logo) logo.focus();
        }
    }, { capture: true });

    ['mousedown', 'pointerdown', 'touchstart'].forEach(evt =>
        document.addEventListener(evt, () => {
            lastInputType = 'mouse';
            lastKey = null;
        }, { capture: true })
    );

    // Keep track when focus enters the menu
    menu.addEventListener('focusin', (e) => {
        openMenu();
        lastFocusedInside = e.target;
    });

    // Arrow navigation, Home/End handling, and new Tab-from-QuickAccess behavior
    menu.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        // If focus isn't inside the menu, ignore
        if (!menu.contains(document.activeElement)) return;

        const items = getMenuItems();
        if (!items.length) return;

        // Find index of currently focused item. If focus is on container, index = -1.
        const active = document.activeElement;
        let idx = items.indexOf(active);

        // Helper to focus item by index (wraps)
        const focusIndex = (newIndex) => {
            const wrapped = (newIndex + items.length) % items.length;
            const toFocus = items[wrapped];
            if (toFocus) {
                // update lastFocusedInside for slippage protection
                lastFocusedInside = toFocus;
                // use focus with preventScroll to avoid page jumps unless user activated link
                toFocus.focus({ preventScroll: true });
            }
        };

        // If user presses forward Tab while focus is inside the Quick-access list,
        // move focus to the first Skip-to item (instead of letting Tab exit the menu).
        if (e.key === 'Tab' && !e.shiftKey) {
            // Is the currently focused element inside the quick-access list?
            if (quickList && active && active.closest && active.closest('[aria-labelledby="nav-assistant-links-heading"]')) {

                // Get the first tabbable (Skip-to) element: prefer elements tabbable via Tab order
                let firstSkip = null;
                if (skipList) {
                    firstSkip = Array.from(skipList.querySelectorAll(FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR))
                        .filter(el => !el.hasAttribute('disabled') && el.offsetParent !== null)[0] || null;
                }
                if (firstSkip) {
                    lastFocusedInside = firstSkip;
                    firstSkip.focus();
                } else {
                    // Fallback: focus the menu container
                    lastFocusedInside = menu;
                    menu.focus({ preventScroll: true });
                }
                return;
            }
            // otherwise let Tab behave normally (it will exit and hide the menu per other logic)
        }

        switch (e.key) {
            case 'ArrowDown':
            case 'Down': // old IE name
                e.preventDefault();
                // If nothing focused inside menu, focus first; otherwise next.
                if (idx === -1) focusIndex(0);
                else focusIndex(idx + 1);
                break;

            case 'ArrowUp':
            case 'Up':
                e.preventDefault();
                if (idx === -1) focusIndex(items.length - 1);
                else focusIndex(idx - 1);
                break;

            case 'Home':
                e.preventDefault();
                focusIndex(0);
                break;

            case 'End':
                e.preventDefault();
                focusIndex(items.length - 1);
                break;

            default:

        if (menu.contains(target)) {

            return;

        // Focus moved outside the menu
        if (!menuOpen) return; // menu already closed — nothing to do

        // Was the focus change an intentional user action?
        // Intentional if:
        //  - last input was keyboard AND last key was "Tab" (user tabbed away)
        //  - OR last input was mouse (user clicked off)
        const intentionalKeyboardLeave = (lastInputType === 'keyboard' && lastKey === 'Tab');
        const intentionalMouseLeave = (lastInputType === 'mouse');

        if (intentionalKeyboardLeave || intentionalMouseLeave) {
            // user intentionally left -> hide the menu and don't undo their focus
            closeMenu();
            return;
        }

        // Otherwise, treat as "slippage" (programmatic focus or virtual cursor) -> move focus back inside
        // Prefer lastFocusedInside; fallback to first menu item; fallback to menu container.
        const menuItems = getMenuItems();
        const toFocus = lastFocusedInside && menu.contains(lastFocusedInside) ? lastFocusedInside
            : (menuItems.length ? menuItems[0] : menu);

        // Use setTimeout to avoid focus loops with assistive tech
        setTimeout(() => {
            try { toFocus.focus(); }
            catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
        }, 0);
    });

    // Close menu on click outside (user-initiated mouse interaction)
    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (!menuOpen) return;
        if (!menu.contains(e.target)) {
            closeMenu();
        }
    }, { capture: true });

    // When a link inside is activated (e.g. skip-to-content), hide the menu.
    menu.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        const el = e.target.closest(FOCUSABLE_SELECTOR);
        if (!el) return;
        closeMenu();
    });

    // Optional: open when focusing the menu container itself
    menu.addEventListener('focus', () => {
        openMenu();
    });

    // Ensure container is focusable for keyboard dismissal/focus return
    if (!menu.hasAttribute('tabindex')) {
        menu.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1');
    }

    // When opened programmatically, focus the first "tabbable" element (Main Content) if none focused.
    // We keep the same behavior: first tabbable (tabbable = focusable via Tab) rather than the first menu item necessarily.
    const ensureFocusInsideWhenOpened = () => {
        if (!menuOpen) return;
        const focusables = getFocusableInside(); // respects tabindex and tab order
        if (focusables.length && !menu.contains(document.activeElement)) {
            focusables[0].focus();
            lastFocusedInside = focusables[0];
        }
    };

    // Monitor class toggles in case other scripts open/close the menu
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
        const nowOpen = menu.classList.contains('nav-assistant-visible');
        if (nowOpen && !menuOpen) {
            menuOpen = true;
            ensureFocusInsideWhenOpened();
        } else {
            menuOpen = nowOpen;
        }
    });
    observer.observe(menu, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['class'] });

        function ($) {
            $(document).ready(function () {

                let slideWrapper = $(".webinse-banner-slider"),
                    lazyImages = slideWrapper.find('.slide-image'),
                    lazyCounter = 0;

                function loadVideo(video) {
                    for (var source in video[0].children) {
                        var videoSource = video[0].children[source];
                        if (typeof videoSource.tagName === "string" && videoSource.tagName === "SOURCE") {
                            videoSource.src = videoSource.dataset.src;
                            videoSource.removeAttribute("data-src");
                        }
                    }

                    video[0].load();
                    video[0].classList.remove("lazy-video");
                }

                function playVideo(video) {
                    video = video.get(0);
                    video.currentTime = 0;
                    video.play();
                }

                // Initialize slider
                slideWrapper.on("init", function (event, slick) {
                    let video = $(slick.$slides.get(0)).find('video');
                    if (video.length) {
                        if (video.hasClass('lazy-video')) {
                            loadVideo(video);
                        }
                        playVideo(video);
                    }
                });
                slideWrapper.on("lazyLoaded", function (event, slick, image, imageSource) {
                    lazyCounter++;
                    if (lazyCounter === lazyImages.length) {
                        lazyImages.addClass('show');
                        slideWrapper.slick("slickPlay");
                    }
                });

                    fade: true,

                        nextSlide = $(slick.$slides.get(nextIndex)),
                        video = nextSlide.find('video');
                    if (video.length) {

                            loadVideo(video);
                        }

const placeholders = document.querySelectorAll('.MagicScroll:not(.MagicScroll-horizontal) > .scroll-item.placeholder-item');

function showPlaceholders() {
    const visiblePlaceholders = scroll[0].offsetWidth <= 1024 ? 5 : 6;

    scroll[0].setAttribute('data-placeholder-items', visiblePlaceholders);
    placeholders.forEach((el, index) => {
        const shouldShow = index < visiblePlaceholders;
        el.classList.toggle('_show-placeholder-item', shouldShow);
    });
